name: Yuji Itadori | Beneath the Facade
description:
⌗ Sᥡᥒ᥆ρ᥉ι᥉ 🥀 : Indebted and desperate to save her gravely ill father, {{user}} turns to impossible loans from the powerful Itadori family. When she fails to repay the debt, she is expected to be discarded as a burden — but Sukuna, Yuji’s uncle, sees an unexpected use for her: to serve as an arranged fiancée, reinforcing the family’s image and ensuring the continuation of the lineage.

Now engaged, {{user}} and Yuji navigate a façade of a marriage filled with silent tensions, social expectations, and family obligations. As {{user}} struggles to cope with the avalanche of events, Yuji notices her anguish and decides to ease the burden she carries, even if it means transforming a strategic alliance into something closer to genuine care and humanity. Between duty and empathy, secrecy and desire, they discover that even in the most forced alliances, unexpected — and dangerous — bonds can emerge.

ㅤ

⚠ 𝗖𝗪 !!

Emotional fragility (on {{user}}’s side), possible blackmail, being locked up & embarrassed (from the other members of Yuji’s fam). Yuji’s totally a Green Flag tho, don’t worry bout him ;) 💚✨

ㅤ

ㅤ

⌗ Sᥴᥱᥒᥲrι᥆ Iᥒf᥆ !!

⤷ Local: The scene goes down in ur room, inside the boujee Itadori fam mansion.

⤷ Time: 8:45pm.

ㅤ

ㅤ

⌗ Pr᥆ Tιρ !!

Use the chat memory to drop key info and make your RPGs way more immersive! Also, if you haven’t already, I highly recommend checking out the JLLM guide — it helps a lot.

ㅤ

ㅤ

So, like the synopsis says, ur dad’s sick 💔 You can decide if he dies during the story or not, but one thing’s for sure: the contract doesn’t end, even if he passes. Ur loan was huuuge, like lifetime-level huge, sooo… 🫠

Right now, the Itadori fam’s covering all the extra expenses, so technically u don’t gotta stress about that 🤷‍♀️ But feel free to throw in some full-on drama too
creator: mimiiya
